channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WIMPLAST] Wim Plast: NCLT Sanctions Composite Scheme of Arrangement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has sanctioned the Composite Scheme of Arrangement involving Wim Plast Limited, Cello Consumer Products Private Limited, and Cello World Limited. The order, dated 14th May 2026, was uploaded to the Tribunal's website. The scheme involves the demerger and transfer of the Demerged Undertaking from Wim Plast Limited (WPL) into Cello Consumer Products Private Limited (CCPL), the issue of equity shares by Cello World Limited (CWL) to the shareholders of WPL, and the amalgamation of WPL with CWL.

  • NCLT Ahmedabad sanctions Composite Scheme of Arrangement for Wim Plast.
  • Scheme involves demerger of WPL undertaking into CCPL.
  • CWL to issue equity shares to WPL shareholders as part of the scheme.
  • WPL to be amalgamated with CWL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIM PLAST LTD.-$ | Category: Merger

item.title: [SADHNA] Crystal Business System: Audited Results for Quarter Ended March 2026
item.description:
Crystal Business System Ltd. announced the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, following a Board Meeting held on May 15, 2026. The board approved the financial results and reviewed the auditor's report. The company has also provided a statement on the impact of audit qualifications on the annual financial results.

  • Board approved audited financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Auditor's Report on the Audited Financial Results was reviewed and taken on record.
  • Statement on impact of audit qualifications on Annual Financial Results provided.
  • Meeting concluded at 06:40 PM on May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sadhna Broadcast Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SKYIND] Sky Industries: Corrigendum to Audited Consolidated Results
item.description:
Sky Industries Ltd issued a corrigendum to its previously submitted audited consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The revision addresses an inadvertent clerical error in the disclosure of financial figures, where an exceptional item was not properly reduced while calculating Net Profit after Tax. Consequently, the Net Profit after Tax and Earnings per Share (EPS) were misstated in the initial report. The company has submitted revised financial results reflecting the correct treatment of exceptional items and the resulting changes in Net Profit after Tax and EPS. The company clarified that the operational performance and cash flows remain unaffected.

  • Sky Industries issues corrigendum to FY26 audited consolidated results.
  • Error in exceptional item treatment led to misstated PAT and EPS.
  • Revised results reflect corrected figures for Net Profit after Tax and EPS.
  • Operational performance and cash flows of the company remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKY INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [OMAXE] Omaxe Ltd Announces Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Omaxe Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board of directors approved the standalone and consolidated financial results in a meeting held on May 15, 2026. The auditor's report issued an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results. The company is in the process of filing the financial results in the XBRL format. The company is facing a SEBI order appeal, but management believes it has no impact on financial results.

  • Omaxe Ltd's board approved audited financial results for FY26 on May 15, 2026.
  • Auditor issued an unmodified opinion on standalone and consolidated results.
  • Company is filing financial results in XBRL format.
  • Appeal against SEBI order is ongoing with next hearing on July 7, 2026.
  • Management believes the SEBI order has no impact on financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMAXE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BAIDFIN] Baid Finserv Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Baid Finserv Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also re-appointed M/s. Shiv Shankar Khandelwal & Co. as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27 and appointed Mr. Rahul Kumar Sharma as Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and Chief Information Officer (CIO), effective May 15, 2026. The trading window will open on May 18, 2026.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Shiv Shankar Khandelwal & Co. re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Rahul Kumar Sharma appointed as CTO and CIO, effective May 15, 2026.
  • Trading window opens on May 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baid Finserv Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KILITCH] Kilitch Drugs India Ltd Announces Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Kilitch Drugs India Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results at a meeting held on May 15, 2026. The statutory auditors have issued unmodified audit reports on the standalone and consolidated financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results approved for FY26.
  • Board meeting held on May 15, 2026, to approve results.
  • Auditors issued unmodified opinion on financial statements.
  • Results are compliant with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KILITCH DRUGS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JLHL] Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Declares 10% Interim Dividend
item.description:
Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd's board approved unaudited and audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. They also approved an interim dividend of 10% per equity share (face value of ₹10) with a record date of May 22, 2026, payable by June 13, 2026. Additionally, the board approved a stock split of 1 equity share (₹10 face value) into 5 equity shares (₹2 face value).

  • Interim dividend of 10% approved for FY 2025-26, record date May 22, 2026.
  • Stock split approved: 1 share of ₹10 face value into 5 shares of ₹2 face value.
  • Unaudited and audited financial results approved for quarter and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Dr. Ajay Thakker appointed as Chairman & Whole Time Director.
  • Aditya Gupta and Dr. Tushar Patil appointed as senior managerial personnel.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [COCHINSHIP] Cochin Shipyard Recommends ₹1.5 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Cochin Shipyard Ltd's board has recommended a final dividend of ₹1.5 per equity share with a face value of ₹5 each for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM). The dividend will be paid within 30 days of its declaration at the AGM. The board also approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Cochin Shipyard recommends a final dividend of ₹1.5 per share for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Payment will be made within 30 days of declaration at the AGM.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cochin Shipyard Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [ARVIND] Arvind Ltd Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ₹4.50 Dividend
item.description:
Arvind Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹4.50 per equity share of face value ₹10 each, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the board approved alteration in the Object Clause of the Memorandum of Association, pending shareholder approval, to include new business transformation services.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved with unmodified auditor opinion.
  • Final dividend of ₹4.50 per share recommended, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Object Clause of Memorandum of Association to be altered for new services, pending shareholder approval.
  • Board meeting commenced at 5:15 P.M. and concluded at 6:20 P.M. on May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARVIND LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAHINDCIE] CIE Automotive Invests ₹48 Lakh in Suryadeep, Acquires 26.09% Stake
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CIE Automotive India Ltd has invested ₹48,00,000 in Suryadeep GJ3 Project Private Limited, acquiring 4,80,000 equity shares at ₹10 each. This investment constitutes 26.09% of Suryadeep's paid-up share capital, making Suryadeep an associate company of CIE Automotive effective May 15, 2026. The investment aims to qualify CIE Automotive as a captive consumer under applicable Electricity Laws, optimizing power costs at its Rajkot, Gujarat factories. The acquisition does not fall within related party transactions.

  • CIE Automotive invests ₹48 Lakh in Suryadeep GJ3 Project Private Limited.
  • Acquires 26.09% stake in Suryadeep, totaling 4,80,000 equity shares.
  • Suryadeep becomes an associate company of CIE Automotive effective May 15, 2026.
  • Investment aims to optimize power costs at Rajkot factories.
  • The acquisition is not a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahindra CIE Automotive Limited | Category: Investment
